notes:
✨ Call Improvements

  • Ringing... in group calls: When you invite someone to a group room, their bubble appears immediately with a "Ringing..." shimmer so you know they're being notified.
  • Declined in group calls: If they decline, their bubble briefly turns red with "Declined" — then disappears quietly, without interrupting the ongoing conversation.
  • Invite from sidebar: While already in a call, the sidebar "Call" button becomes "Invite" (or "Add" for Jester) — tap it to pull someone into your current room without leaving.
